description_long: This is a single low-top casual shoe with a taupe suede upper, featuring visible stitching along the sides and heel. The shoe has a rounded toe and a standard lace-up closure with five eyelets on each side, using matching taupe laces. The midsole is primarily white with a distinctive red stripe running horizontally along its length, and the outsole is black, providing contrast and grip. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, dark fabric for comfort. The heel counter is reinforced with additional stitching, and the overall design is sleek yet sturdy, suitable for urban environments. The shoe shows no visible signs of wear, maintaining a clean and well-constructed appearance.
description: A taupe suede low-top casual shoe with a white and red-striped midsole, black outsole, and standard lacing. The shoe is clean, well-stitched, and designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the reinforced heel, visible stitching, and the red stripe on the midsole.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the taupe suede upper, white midsole with red stripe, and the full lace-up closure.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the rounded toe, lacing system, and the shoe's overall sleek shape.
description_view_3: Rear side angle emphasizing the heel stitching, red midsole stripe, and the shoe's low-top design.
